name: xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_plain
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: OPEN residual (D-155, pre-existing — fails on the pre-port base identically): same-epoch UPDATE-then-DELETE where the update brings the fact INTO a plain accumulate. Drools executes each queued entry incrementally — the upd entry folds it in and dirties the result, the delete folds it out; the terminal fires the NET-ZERO value (W:0). The engine batches both into one staging window and the ins+del compensation swallows the emission (no fire). Root: per-entry incremental flush at NON-windowed nodes — the deferred-entry semantics D-155 ported for windowed accumulate nodes, generalized. 22 of the 23 winacc-population residuals are this shape; unreachable in fuzz_cep (max 1 op/epoch). Follow-on slab.
